summary: PHASE 13.5 Alpha Graph comprehensive backend testing completed successfully. All 12 specified endpoints tested and working correctly. Graph built with 107 nodes and 4843 edges across 5 relation types (supports: 3165, contradicts: 212, conditional_on: 1445, amplifies: 21, invalidates: 0). Reasoning engine correctly evaluates signal coherence - detecting supporting chains between momentum+breakout factors and conflicts between breakout+regime factors.
passed_tests: GET /api/alpha-graph/nodes - listing with family filter working ✅
GET /api/alpha-graph/edges - listing with relation_type filter working ✅
GET /api/alpha-graph/relation-types - all 5 types returned with counts ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with clear separation: builder, reasoner, repository, routes
All 5 relation types properly implemented: supports, amplifies, contradicts, conditional_on, invalidates
Family relationship matrices (FAMILY_SUPPORTS, FAMILY_CONTRADICTS, FAMILY_AMPLIFIES) are comprehensive
Coherence scoring algorithm correctly weights positive (support, amplify) and negative (conflict, invalidate) contributions
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all repository queries

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 21 pytest tests passed, all 12 endpoints working correctly
success_rate.frontend: N/A - Backend only testing as requested

seed_data_creation: Graph built from 105+ approved factors from PHASE 13.4 Factor Ranker
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHASE 13.5 Alpha Graph is fully functional. Graph has 107 nodes (from approved factors) and 4843 edges. Reasoning engine evaluates signal coherence based on relationship types between active factors. Key test scenarios: momentum+breakout (supporting, coherence ~0.61), breakout+regime (conflicting, coherence ~0.46). All endpoints tested via pytest in /app/backend/tests/test_phase135_alpha_graph.py
